    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    A

    action() - Methode in Datensatzklasse at.jku.se.iot.DeviceCommand
    Gibt den Wert für die Datensatzkomponente action zurück.
    actionDevice - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    The device on which the rule's action is performed.
    actionDeviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    Identifier of the device the rule's action applies to.
    actionDeviceId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Identifier of the device acted upon when the rule fires.
    actionDeviceName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Name of the device acted upon when the rule fires.
    actionValue - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    Value to set on the action device when the rule fires.
    actionValue - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.ScheduleRequest
    Value to apply when the schedule fires.
    actionValue - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Value applied to the action device when the rule fires.
    actionValue - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ScheduleResponse
    Action payload to apply to the target device.
    actionValue - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    The value to apply to actionDevice when the rule fires.
    actionValue - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Schedule
    The value to apply when the schedule fires.
    activate(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.SceneResource
    Activates a scene: applies all device target states, logs each change, and sends a notification to the scene owner (FR-17).
    active - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    Whether the rule is active and should be evaluated.
    active - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.ScheduleRequest
    Whether the schedule is active and should fire.
    active - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.VacationModeRequest
    Whether vacation mode should be active.
    active - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Whether the rule is currently active.
    active - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ScheduleResponse
    Whether the schedule is currently enabled.
    active - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.VacationModeResponse
    Whether vacation mode is currently enabled.
    active - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    Whether this rule is currently active.
    active - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Schedule
    Whether this schedule is currently active.
    active - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.VacationMode
    Whether vacation mode is currently enabled.
    ActivityLog - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    An immutable audit record capturing every manual or automated device state change (FR-08).
    ActivityLog() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.ActivityLog
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
    ActivityLogMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps ActivityLog entities to response DTOs.
    ActivityLogRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for ActivityLog entities.
    ActivityLogRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.ActivityLogRepository
    Creates the repository; intended for CDI instantiation.
    ActivityLogResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for reading activity logs and CSV export (FR-08, FR-16).
    ActivityLogResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.ActivityLogResource
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.
    ActivityLogResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for a single activity log entry (FR-08).
    ActivityLogResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ActivityLogResponse
    Creates an empty response; fields are populated by the mapping layer.
    actor - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.DeviceStateRequest
    The user or system component performing the action — recorded in the activity log.
    actor - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ActivityLogResponse
    User or system component that performed the action.
    actor - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.ActivityLog
    Name of the user or automation rule that caused the change.
    addLog(EnergyLogRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.EnergyResource
    Manually records an energy log entry for a device (for testing / FR-14).
